findings.description: Extraneous digital signature metadata is rendered as visible text in the HTML, disrupting the reading flow.
findings.evidence: In the HTML on page 1, a block of text starting with 'Digitally signed by LYF...' appears between the 'From' and 'Subject' fields. This text is not visible in the source PDF.

findings.description: Hierarchical list indentation is lost for the attachments list.
findings.evidence: In the PDF on page 5, items I through IX are indented under the 'IV. Attachments' heading. In the HTML, they are rendered as flush-left paragraphs without list indentation.
